mapper.select: SELECT log_id, admin_id, action_type, target_type, target_id, result_status, created_at FROM admin_operation_logs ORDER BY log_id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO admin_operation_logs ( admin_id, action_type, target_type, target_id, result_status, created_at ) VALUES ( #{adminId}, #{actionType}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{resultStatus}, #{createdAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE admin_operation_logs SET admin_id = #{adminId}, action_type = #{actionType}, target_id = #{targetId}, result_status = #{resultStatus}, target_type = #{targetType} WHERE log_id = #{logId}
